name: python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types
title: python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types
summary: Set the models of parameters types for the agents (Python 3)
description:
Set the models of parameters types for the agents (Python 3)
This module sets the models of parameters types for the agents:
- How to pass them by identifier strings
- How to encode/decode them to pass data between the Faraday server and the
agents dispatcher
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types because Set the models of parameters types for the agents (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-faraday-agent-parameters-types --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
